list.vod_blurb: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place has been renewed for a second season.
list.vod_content: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place has been renewed for a second season.

Following the success of its 2023 series, the critically-acclaimed hit drama Shetland has been recommissioned by the BBC for two new series. A Silverprint Pictures production (part of ITV Studios) for the BBC, the double series commission - Shetlandâ€™s ninth and tenth - will film in locations on the Shetland Isles and across Scotland in 2024 and 2025.
